name: bizdays
description: Business-day & public-holiday calculations for 200+ countries for AI agents — not guesses.
long_description: Deterministic business-day and public-holiday calculations for 200+ countries: add or count working days, find the next/previous business day, check whether a date is a business day, and inspect a country's weekend rule — correctly handling country-specific weekends and holidays that models routinely get wrong. Runs locally, no key.

tools.name: add_business_days
tools.description: Add N working days to a date (country-aware).

tools.name: count_business_days
tools.description: Count working days between two dates.

tools.name: is_business_day
tools.description: Check whether a date is a working day in a country.

tools.name: next_business_day
tools.description: Find the next working day after a date.

tools.name: previous_business_day
tools.description: Find the previous working day before a date.
